_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: FTB Generic (Java 21) v3
author: openai@example.com
description: FTB modpack installer egg for Java 21 with editable FTB pack/version IDs. Installs via the FTB Linux server installer, force/noninteractive, and patches run.sh to use the container Java instead of bundled JRE paths.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -e
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo 'Downloading FTB installer...'
curl -L -o installer "https://api.feed-the-beast.com/v1/modpacks/public/modpack/${FTB_PACK_ID}/${FTB_VERSION_ID}/server/linux"
chmod +x installer

echo 'Running FTB installer...'
./installer -auto -force -pack "${FTB_PACK_ID}" -version "${FTB_VERSION_ID}" -dir /mnt/server

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/run.sh ]; then
  echo 'run.sh was not created. Listing /mnt/server for debugging:'
  ls -lah /mnt/server
  exit 1
fi

echo 'Patching run.sh to use container Java...'
cp /mnt/server/run.sh /mnt/server/run.sh.bak
awk '{ gsub(/jre\/[^[:space:]]*\/bin\/java/, "java"); print }' /mnt/server/run.sh.bak > /mnt/server/run.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/run.sh

if grep -q 'jre/.*/bin/java' /mnt/server/run.sh; then
  echo 'Failed to patch run.sh. Current contents:'
  nl -ba /mnt/server/run.sh | sed -n '1,40p'
  exit 1
fi

echo 'run.sh patched successfully.'
echo 'Install complete.'

variables.name: FTB Modpack ID
variables.description: The FTB modpack ID to install. StoneBlock 4 is 130.

variables.name: FTB Version ID
variables.description: The exact FTB modpack version ID to install. The tested StoneBlock 4 version in this setup was 100256.
